author: codex-root

patch.value:
## Scope

Research the current WebSocket validation contract against official documentation, current Home Assistant Core source, and the configured live instance. Add typed trigger, condition, and action validation with local JSON/file checks, keep generic passthrough, repair release-time version assertions, update docs, preserve 100 percent coverage, and prove the scheduled workflow on a clean hosted runner without publishing from the development PR.
Add typed automation validation and release-safe version contracts

Expose the official Home Assistant WebSocket automation validation contract through a typed agent-friendly command and repair scheduled releases so candidate version bumps cannot invalidate the test suite.

hassio ws validate-config accepts trigger, condition, and action JSON plus a combined file and maps them to the server-supported plural payload contract; empty and malformed validation input fails before network I/O with actionable errors; scheduled release candidate version mutation passes the complete release test suite without weakening package/src version parity; all help, output formats, docs, live redacted checks, 100/100/100/100 coverage, docstrings, file-size, security, pm, and release gates pass
Official docs, current Core source, live instance behavior, repository code, full pm lineage, and failed hosted run are understood
Complete stable Home Assistant API coverage for agent workflows
Typed automation validation and release-safe candidate verification
Agents can validate automations without executing them while daily releases remain dependable
Prevents unsafe trial-and-error automation writes and blocked scheduled releases
A fully documented typed validation command and green scheduled release rehearsal
Official/live contract research exposed the gap while GitHub issue #65 proves the current release regression

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Duplicate-safe searches found adjacent closed lineage but no existing typed validate_config or hard-coded candidate-version regression item.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Never store live automation contents,entity inventories,tokens,user IDs,signed paths,or raw server responses in tracker or repository evidence.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Home Assistant 2026.4.4 and current Core source require plural validate_config keys even though the rendered API docs currently describe singular labels.

message: Create non-duplicate API and release delivery feature after all-status search

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Implementation is published for review in GitHub PR #66 with permanent master-relative links to this feature and every child item.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: PR #66 merged to master as ad7b961a88ecc0bc65603c015028551fab79f44c. Hosted Auto Release run 29982134051 passed on that exact head with dry_run true pushed false target 2026.7.23 and tag v2026.7.23; GitHub issue #65 closed through the merged PR.

patch.value: Added typed non-executing automation validation and candidate-safe version tests; all local live hosted and review gates passed.

author: codex-root

patch.value: Agents can validate trigger condition and action definitions without execution; scheduled release verification no longer depends on a stale version literal.
Safe typed validation plus reliable daily release preparation.
Live Home Assistant 2026.4.4 validation passed; PR #66 merged; hosted dry-run target v2026.7.23 passed without publication.
Typed automation validation and release-safe candidate verification are merged and proven on master.

message: Close parent feature after all children and merged acceptance
